subject: Need invoice for Q4 2025
email:
Hi,

I'm Sarah from the finance team at Acme Corp. We need the invoice for our Q4 2025 subscription ([OrderNumber] SUB-2025-Q4) for our accounting records. Could you please send it in PDF format?

We also noticed a discrepancy of $15 on the last invoice compared to our contract rate. Can you clarify?

Thanks,
Sarah
expected_response:
Hi Sarah,

Thank you for reaching out. You can download your Q4 2025 invoice from Settings > Billing > Invoices in PDF or CSV format.

Regarding the $15 discrepancy, I'll review your account against your contract rate and follow up within 24 hours with a detailed breakdown.

Best regards,
Support Team

subject: Request refund for annual plan
email:
Hello,

I purchased the annual Business plan 20 days ago ([TransactionID] TXN-88421) but our team decided to go with a different tool. I'd like to request a full refund per your refund policy.

Please let me know the timeline for processing.

Best,
James
expected_response:
Hi James,

I've reviewed your refund request for transaction TXN-88421. Since you're within our 30-day refund window for annual plans, I've approved your full refund.

The refund will be processed to your original payment method within 5-10 business days. You'll receive a confirmation email once complete.

Best regards,
Support Team

subject: Locked out of my account
email:
Hi Support,

I've been locked out of my account after multiple failed login attempts. I tried the password reset link but it expired. I need urgent access for a client meeting in 2 hours.

My email is emily.r@startup.io

Please help!
Emily
expected_response:
Hi Emily,

I understand you need urgent access. Here's how to regain access:

1. Your account lock will automatically release after 30 minutes from the last failed attempt
2. Request a new password reset at the login page - the link is valid for 1 hour
3. Check your spam folder for the reset email

If you still can't access after trying these steps, reply here and I'll manually unlock your account.

Best regards,
Support Team
